phases.summary: Created the H-Log phase registry and initial step documents for the blog and automated publishing roadmap.

Steps 0-5 completed: DB content contract, published-only route boundary, Markdown/HTML integrity, safe public rendering, public HTTPS source links, index surface, and non-routed admin workflow contract.
Steps 0-4 completed: OCI runtime topology, Compose service boundary, hardened local Nginx reverse proxy, PostgreSQL backup/restore runbook, and deploy smoke/rollback runbook.

Steps 0-3 completed: publish state transitions, required vs retryable job failure handling, operational audit logging, correction version history, unpublish/retract public removal, and terminal-status republish blocking are tested. Actual OCI server setup remains approval-required before search work.

Steps 0-3 completed. OCI Compose runtime, localhost:8080 Nginx smoke, admin/internal blocking, deploy smoke, logical backup, and isolated pgvector restore rehearsal passed. Production domain/TLS, 80/443 public smoke, and Cloudflare-style admin/internal trust-zone blocking are marked for the later domain purchase/production cutover.

Steps 0-3 completed: hybrid keyword/vector search, /api/search cost guard, fresh post_chunks related similarity, and /blog published-only search UI with cached/loading/empty/rate-limited/error states are tested. No chatbot, SSE, or visitor session memory was added.

Steps 0-3 completed: post-publish verification jobs, crawler outputs, retryable IndexNow/Discord adapters, and published-only content hash reconciliation with publish_verifications failure handoff are tested.
